title: Butterfly and Wildflower Garden Coloring Page

author: Antigravity Agent
funFacts: The butterfly drinks sweet flower nectar through a long, straw-like mouth part that rolls up when not in use.
butterflys taste food using chemical receptors located on their feet, helping them select host plants for their eggs.
